     The Numbers Business Report

The Invisible Man (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,914,050Details
International Box Office $74,097,915
Worldwide Box Office $139,011,965
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,809,659
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,762,849
Total $13,572,508
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Trapped in a violent, controlling relationship with a wealthy and brilliant scientist, Cecilia Kass escapes in the dead of night and disappears into hiding, aided by her sister, their childhood friend and his teenage daughter. But when Cecilia’s abusive ex commits suicide and leaves her a generous portion of his vast fortune, Cecilia suspects his death was a hoax. As a series of eerie coincidences turns lethal, threatening the lives of those she loves, Cecilia’s sanity begins to unravel as she desperately tries to prove that she is being hunted by someone nobody can see.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,205,665 (43.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 19.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,610 opening theaters/3,636 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $84,572,114

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 28th, 2020 (Wide) by Universal
February 28th, 2020 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: February 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Indonesia)
February 26th, 2020 (Wide) (South Korea)
February 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Egypt)
February 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Philippines)
February 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: March 20th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
June 29th, 2020 by Universal Pictures UK
MPA Rating: R for some strong bloody violence, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2611 (Cert #52535), 1/8/2020)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell
Plot point: Domestic Abuse, Faked Suicide, Inheritance, Relationships Gone Wrong, Stalker, Suicide
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Goalpost Pictures, Blumhouse, Nervous Tick , Universal Pictures
Production Countries: Australia, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Trapped in a violent, controlling relationship with a wealthy and brilliant scientist, Cecilia Kass escapes in the dead of night and disappears into hiding, aided by her sister, their childhood friend and his teenage daughter. But when Cecilia’s abusive ex commits suicide and leaves her a generous portion of his vast fortune, Cecilia suspects his death was a hoax. As a series of eerie coincidences turns lethal, threatening the lives of those she loves, Cecilia’s sanity begins to unravel as she desperately tries to prove that she is being hunted by someone nobody can see.
